name: workday-mcp
description: Read-only Workday access for Claude — fetch your tasks, pay, benefits and compensation data through your signed-in session

tenant.title: Workday tenant
tenant.description: Your Workday tenant slug — the path segment after the host, e.g. for https://wd5.myworkday.com/acme it is `acme`.

host.title: Workday host
host.description: Your Workday data-center host. Defaults to wd5.myworkday.com.

tools.name: workday_get_task
tools.description: Read a Workday task or data card by path — title, fields, references, related tasks

tools.name: workday_healthcheck
tools.description: Verify the fetchproxy bridge + Workday session end-to-end
